categories.name: Blue Team
categories.description: Defensive Security: Forensics, IR, Threat Hunting, SOC

certs.name: Security+
certs.description: Entry-level security fundamentals, DoD 8570 baseline. Covers threats, attacks, architecture, operations, and governance.

certs.name: CySA+
certs.description: SOC analyst skills: threat detection, vulnerability management, incident response, and security operations.

certs.name: BTL1
certs.description: Junior SOC certification: phishing analysis, digital forensics, SIEM, incident response. 24-hour practical exam.

certs.name: HTB CDSA
certs.description: Defensive security analyst fundamentals. SOC operations, log analysis, threat detection, and incident handling.

certs.name: OSIR
certs.description: Foundational incident response certification. Splunk analysis, digital forensics, incident handling lifecycle. 8-hour practical exam.

certs.name: OSTH
certs.description: Foundational threat hunting certification. CrowdStrike Falcon, Splunk, behavioral analysis, IoC detection. 8-hour practical exam.

certs.name: CASP+
certs.description: Advanced security practitioner with technical leadership skills. Enterprise security architecture, risk management, and research.

certs.name: BTL2
certs.description: Advanced SOC certification: malware analysis, advanced threat hunting, vulnerability management, and SIEM correlation.

certs.name: CCDL1
certs.description: SOC analyst certification with 24-hour practical exam. Network forensics, disk forensics, memory forensics, threat hunting.

certs.name: GCIH
certs.description: Incident handler certification: detection, analysis, containment, and remediation. SANS SEC504 training recommended (~$8,000).

certs.name: GCFE
certs.description: Windows forensic analysis certification. Registry analysis, user activity reconstruction, timeline analysis. SANS FOR500 training recommended (~$8,000).

certs.name: GIME
certs.description: Apple device forensics certification. iOS and macOS artifact analysis, data extraction, and evidence collection. SANS FOR518 training recommended (~$8,000).

certs.name: GASF
certs.description: Mobile device forensics certification. Android/iOS analysis, app data extraction, cloud artifacts. SANS FOR585 training recommended (~$8,000).

certs.name: GCIR
certs.description: Cloud incident response certification. AWS/Azure/GCP log analysis, cloud forensics, incident handling. SANS SEC588 training recommended (~$8,000).

certs.name: GLIR
certs.description: Linux incident response certification. Command-line triage, log analysis, malware detection, system hardening. SANS SEC506 training recommended (~$8,000).

certs.name: GCTI
certs.description: Threat intelligence certification. Strategic/operational/tactical intelligence, threat actor profiling, intelligence lifecycle. SANS FOR578 training recommended (~$8,000).

certs.name: CCDL2
certs.description: Advanced SOC certification with 48-hour practical exam. Enterprise forensics, advanced threat hunting, incident response at scale.

certs.name: GCFA
certs.description: Advanced incident response and threat hunting certification. Memory forensics, timeline analysis, enterprise-scale investigations. SANS FOR508 training recommended (~$8,000).

certs.name: GEIR
certs.description: Enterprise incident response certification. Large-scale IR, threat hunting, adversary tracking, incident coordination. SANS FOR508 training recommended (~$8,000).

certs.name: GNFA
certs.description: Network forensics certification. Packet capture analysis, protocol analysis, network traffic reconstruction. SANS FOR572 training recommended (~$8,000).

certs.name: GCFR
certs.description: Cloud forensics certification. AWS/Azure/GCP forensic analysis, cloud artifact collection, incident response. SANS FOR509 training recommended (~$8,000).

certs.name: GREM
certs.description: Malware analysis certification. Static/dynamic analysis, debugging, disassembly, malware behavior extraction. SANS FOR610 training recommended (~$8,000).

categories.name: Red Team
categories.description: Offensive Operations: Adversary simulation, exploit development

certs.name: eJPT
certs.description: Junior penetration tester certification. Practical labs covering network attacks, web exploitation, and pivoting.

certs.name: HTB CPTS
certs.description: Penetration testing fundamentals. Network pentesting, web exploitation, privilege escalation, reporting.

certs.name: OSCP
certs.description: Industry-standard penetration testing certification. 24-hour practical exam covering network exploitation, Active Directory attacks, web attacks, and privilege escalation. Requires PEN-200 course (~$1,500).

certs.name: OSWP
certs.description: Wireless penetration testing certification. WPA/WPA2 attacks, wireless reconnaissance, rogue AP deployment. Requires PEN-210 course (~$1,500).

certs.name: CRTP
certs.description: Active Directory red team operations. AD enumeration, Kerberos attacks, privilege escalation, lateral movement.

certs.name: CRTO
certs.description: Red team operations certification. CREST-aligned, adversary simulation, Cobalt Strike, operational security.

certs.name: OSEP
certs.description: Advanced penetration testing certification. Evasion techniques, lateral movement, custom tooling, AV bypass. Requires PEN-300 course (~$1,500). OSCP prerequisite.

certs.name: OSWE
certs.description: Web application security expert certification. White-box testing, source code review, advanced web exploitation. Requires WEB-300 course (~$1,500).

certs.name: OSED
certs.description: Exploit development certification. Windows exploitation, buffer overflows, shellcode development, bypass techniques. Requires EXP-301 course (~$1,500).

certs.name: CRTE
certs.description: Advanced red team certification. Multi-domain AD attacks, advanced persistence, evasion techniques, enterprise environments.

certs.name: CARTP
certs.description: Azure red team operations. Azure AD attacks, cloud persistence, hybrid identity exploitation, Azure security controls.

certs.name: CARTE
certs.description: Advanced Azure red team certification. Enterprise Azure environments, advanced evasion, multi-tenant attacks, cloud-native exploitation.

certs.name: CRTM
certs.description: Red team master certification. Multi-forest enterprise attacks, advanced adversary simulation, custom tooling, operational security at scale.

certs.name: OSEE
certs.description: Exploitation expert certification. Kernel-level exploitation, advanced Windows internals, custom shellcode, 0-day research. Requires EXP-401 course (~$1,500).

certs.name: OSCE3
certs.description: Elite combination certification: OSEP + OSWE + OSED. Demonstrates mastery across penetration testing, web exploitation, and exploit development.

categories.name: Pentest
categories.description: Penetration Testing: Network, web, wireless, mobile

certs.name: PenTest+
certs.description: Penetration testing fundamentals. Methodology, reconnaissance, vulnerability assessment, reporting, and compliance.

certs.name: eJPT
certs.description: Junior pentester certification. Hands-on practical labs covering network attacks, web exploitation, and pivoting.

certs.name: HTB CPTS
certs.description: Comprehensive pentest methodology. Network pentesting, web exploitation, privilege escalation, active directory, reporting.

certs.name: OSCP
certs.description: Gold standard pentest certification. 24-hour practical exam covering Active Directory, network exploitation, web attacks, and privilege escalation.

certs.name: OSWP
certs.description: Wireless pentest specialist. WPA/WPA2 attacks, wireless reconnaissance, rogue AP deployment, wireless security assessment.

certs.name: HTB CWEE
certs.description: Web exploitation expert. Advanced web vulnerabilities, API security, modern web frameworks, source code review.

certs.name: HTB CADE
certs.fullName: HackTheBox Certified Active Directory Pentesting Expert
certs.description: Active Directory pentesting expert. AD enumeration, Kerberos attacks, domain persistence, lateral movement, AD security assessment.

certs.name: CRTP
certs.description: Active Directory pentest focus. AD enumeration, Kerberos attacks, privilege escalation, lateral movement, persistence.

certs.name: OSEP
certs.description: Advanced pentest certification. Evasion techniques, lateral movement, custom tooling, AV bypass, operational security.

certs.name: OSWE
certs.description: Web application security expert. Source code review, white-box testing, advanced web exploitation, vulnerability research.

certs.name: CRTE
certs.description: Advanced AD pentest. Multi-domain attacks, advanced persistence, evasion techniques, enterprise environment exploitation.

categories.name: Management
categories.description: Security Leadership: Governance, risk, compliance, strategy

certs.name: Security+
certs.description: Security fundamentals and compliance baseline. Threats, attacks, architecture, operations, governance, and risk management.

certs.name: Project+
certs.description: IT project management fundamentals. Project lifecycle, team leadership, scheduling, documentation, and governance.

certs.name: CASP+
certs.description: Advanced security practitioner with technical leadership. Enterprise security architecture, risk management, research, and collaboration.

certs.name: CySA+
certs.description: Security analyst with threat management focus. Vulnerability management, incident response, security operations, and compliance.

certs.name: SSCP
certs.description: Systems security practitioner. Operational security, access controls, risk identification, security administration, and incident response.

certs.name: CISSP
certs.fullName: ISC2 Certified Information Systems Security Professional
certs.description: Gold standard security management certification. 8 domains: security and risk management, asset security, security architecture, communication and network security, identity and access management, security assessment and testing, security operations, software development security.

certs.name: CCSP
certs.description: Cloud security professional certification. Cloud concepts, architecture, design, data security, platform security, operations, and legal/compliance.

certs.name: CISM
certs.description: Information security management certification. Governance, risk management, program development, incident management, and security strategy.

certs.name: CISA
certs.description: Information systems auditing certification. Audit process, governance, IT lifecycle, asset protection, and business continuity.

certs.name: CRISC
certs.fullName: ISACA Certified in Risk and Information Systems Control
certs.description: Risk management certification. IT risk identification, assessment, response, and control monitoring. Enterprise risk management.

certs.name: CISSP-ISSMP
certs.fullName: ISC2 CISSP - Information Systems Security Management Professional
certs.description: Security management professional concentration. Strategic security leadership, business continuity, vendor risk management, and governance.

certs.name: CISSP-ISSAP
certs.fullName: ISC2 CISSP - Information Systems Security Architecture Professional
certs.description: Security architecture professional concentration. Security architecture design, infrastructure security, identity management, and security operations.

certs.name: CISSP-ISSEP
certs.fullName: ISC2 CISSP - Information Systems Security Engineering Professional
certs.description: Security engineering professional concentration. Security engineering principles, systems security engineering, and technical security management.

categories.name: AI Security
categories.description: AI/ML Security: Offensive AI, defensive AI, ML operations

certs.name: AI+
certs.description: AI fundamentals certification. Machine learning concepts, neural networks, ethical AI, data preparation, and AI applications.

certs.name: HTB COAE
certs.description: Offensive AI expert certification. AI red teaming, LLM exploitation, prompt injection, model extraction, and AI system attacks.

certs.name: OSAI
certs.description: AI red team certification. Attacking LLMs, multi-agent systems, RAG pipelines, embeddings, AI infrastructure. 24-hour practical exam.

certs.name: Data+
certs.description: Data analysis certification. Data visualization, statistical analysis, data governance, and AI/ML data preparation fundamentals.

certs.name: GASAE
certs.description: AI security automation engineer. AI for red/blue/purple teams, ML model security, AI-powered security operations, and automation.

certs.name: GOAA
certs.description: Offensive AI analyst certification. Offensive AI techniques, AI-powered attacks, adversarial machine learning, and AI threat modeling.

certs.name: GMLE
certs.description: Machine learning engineer for security. ML for SOC operations, threat detection, anomaly detection, and security automation.
